_comment: Narrow unit info panel: a lone Spearmen regiment (drill mode, no opponent) is selected so the bottom-left info panel fills, then ordered on a short march south so the panel's dynamic lines (Speed, Accel, Gait) visibly tick while it walks. The point under review is the panel itself: every stat sits on its own line, so the panel reads as one narrow top-to-bottom column instead of packing three stats abreast. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
